$schema.description: URL of the JSON schema that describes the format of this file.

image.description: Docker image to use for the dev container.

dockerfile.description: Path to the Dockerfile to use for building the image.

target.description: Target stage for multi-stage Docker builds.

cacheFrom.description: List of images to cache from.

ssh.description: SSH mount sources to use during build.

src.description: Path or source of the secret.

secrets.description: Secrets to pass to the build process.

dockerComposeFile.description: List of Docker Compose files to use.

service.description: Specific service to run from Docker Compose.

runServices.description: Docker Compose services to start automatically alongside the dev container service.

workspaceFolder.description: Path to the workspace folder inside the container.

workspaceMount.description: Mount type for the workspace folder.

remoteUser.description: User that tools run as inside the container (VS Code, extensions, terminals).

containerUser.description: User for all processes inside the container, including the entrypoint.

updateRemoteUserUID.description: Sync the container user UID/GID with the local user on Linux to avoid permission issues.

userEnvProbe.description: Shell type used to probe user environment variables.

containerEnv.description: Environment variables to set in the container.

remoteEnv.description: Environment variables for remote connections (like SSH).

forwardPorts.description: Ports that are forwarded from the container to the local machine. Can be an integer port number, or a string of the format "host:port_number"

appPort.description: Legacy: ports to publish from the container. Prefer forwardPorts instead.

onAutoForward.description: Behavior when the port is auto-forwarded (notify, openBrowser, ignore).
Behavior when the port is auto-forwarded (notify, openBrowser, ignore).

otherPortsAttributes.description: Default attributes applied to all forwarded ports not defined in portsAttributes.

consistency.description: Consistency mode for the mount (e.g., cached, delegated, consistent).

runArgs.description: Additional arguments to pass to 'docker run'.

startupCommand.description: Command to run on container startup.

overrideCommand.description: Whether to override the container's default startup command with the devcontainer lifecycle commands.

command.description: Command to run inside the container instead of the default CMD.

entrypoint.description: Entrypoint to override in the container.

init.description: Whether to run an init process inside the container.

privileged.description: Run the container in privileged mode.

capAdd.description: Linux capabilities to add to the container.

capDrop.description: Linux capabilities to drop from the container.

devices.description: Devices to expose to the container.

cores.description: Minimum number of GPU cores required.

gpu.description: GPU requirement (true, false, or object with cores/memory).

hostRequirements.description: Minimum host hardware requirements for the dev container.

overrideFeatureInstallOrder.description: Order to install features inside the container, overriding defaults.

features.description: Features to install in the container and their options.

initializeCommand.description: Command to run on the host before the container is created or started. Can be a string or an array of strings.

onCreateCommand.description: Command to run after the container is created. Can be a string or an array of strings.

updateContentCommand.description: Command to run when the container content is updated. Can be a string or an array of strings.

postCreateCommand.description: Command to run after the container is created and initialized. Can be a string or an array of strings.

postStartCommand.description: Command to run after the container starts. Can be a string or an array of strings.

postAttachCommand.description: Command to run after attaching to the container. Can be a string or an array of strings.

waitFor.description: Lifecycle command to wait for before the tool considers the container ready.
List of processes or files to wait for before starting.

restart.description: List of files or events that trigger a restart.

watch.description: Configuration for files/processes to watch for restarts.

extensions.description: List of VS Code extensions to install.

remoteUser.description: Remote user for VS Code container setup.

extensions.description: List of Codespaces extensions to install.

plugins.description: List of JetBrains plugins to install.
List of Neovim plugins to install.

default.description: Default value for the secret if none is provided.

secrets.description: Secrets to pass to the container.

shutdownAction.description: Action to take when the container is stopped.
